name: maxtext
description: MaxText is a high-performance, highly scalable, open-source LLM library written in pure Python/JAX, targeting Google Cloud TPUs and GPUs for training and fine-tuning large language models including Gemma, Llama, DeepSeek, Qwen, and Mistral. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
